---
title: "Recovery Trajectories"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("../R/utils.R")
source("../R/meta-analysis.R")
source("../R/plots.R")

studies <- read_study_database()
recovery <- read_extracted_data("recovery_trajectories")
has_data <- nrow(recovery) > 0
```

## Overview

Recovery from Long COVID and ME/CFS is variable, often non-linear, and strongly modulated by the presence of post-exertional malaise (PEM). This section synthesises longitudinal recovery data, stratified by PEM status where available.

## Recovery Rates

### Overall

```{r}
#| label: recovery-overall
#| eval: !expr has_data
if (has_data) {
  overall <- recovery[!is.na(recovery$recovery_pct), ]
  if (nrow(overall) >= 2) {
    fit <- run_prevalence_meta(
      overall,
      xi_col = "recovery_n",
      ni_col = "n"
    )
    bt <- fit$back_transform(coef(fit), fit$ci.lb, fit$ci.ub)
    cat(sprintf(
      "Pooled recovery rate: **%.1f%%** (95%% CI: %.1f%%–%.1f%%)\n",
      bt$prevalence * 100, bt$ci_lower * 100, bt$ci_upper * 100
    ))
  }
}
```

### By PEM Status

```{r}
#| label: recovery-pem
#| eval: !expr has_data
#| fig-cap: "Recovery rates with and without PEM"
if (has_data && any(!is.na(recovery$pem_status))) {
  pem_recovery <- recovery[!is.na(recovery$pem_status), ]

  for (status in unique(pem_recovery$pem_status)) {
    sub <- pem_recovery[pem_recovery$pem_status == status, ]
    if (nrow(sub) >= 2) {
      fit_sub <- run_prevalence_meta(sub, xi_col = "recovery_n", ni_col = "n")
      bt <- fit_sub$back_transform(coef(fit_sub), fit_sub$ci.lb, fit_sub$ci.ub)
      cat(sprintf(
        "\n**%s**: %.1f%% (95%% CI: %.1f%%–%.1f%%)\n",
        status, bt$prevalence * 100, bt$ci_lower * 100, bt$ci_upper * 100
      ))
    }
  }
}
```

## Recovery Over Time

```{r}
#| label: recovery-trajectory
#| eval: !expr has_data
#| fig-cap: "Recovery trajectory by timepoint and PEM status"
if (has_data && any(!is.na(recovery$timepoint_months))) {
  trajectory <- recovery[!is.na(recovery$timepoint_months) & !is.na(recovery$recovery_pct), ]

  if (nrow(trajectory) >= 3) {
    ggplot(trajectory, aes(
      x = timepoint_months,
      y = recovery_pct / 100,
      colour = pem_status
    )) +
      geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = cols_review, name = "PEM Status") +
      labs(
        title = "Recovery Trajectories Over Time",
        x = "Months post-infection",
        y = "Recovery rate",
        size = "Sample size"
      ) +
      theme_review
  }
}
```

## Quality of Life Trajectories

```{r}
#| label: qol-trajectory
#| eval: !expr has_data
#| fig-cap: "Quality of life over time by PEM status"
if (has_data && any(!is.na(recovery$qol_score))) {
  qol <- recovery[!is.na(recovery$qol_score), ]
  if (nrow(qol) >= 3) {
    ggplot(qol, aes(x = timepoint_months, y = qol_score, colour = pem_status)) +
      geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = cols_review, name = "PEM Status") +
      labs(
        title = "Quality of Life Over Time",
        x = "Months post-infection",
        y = "QoL Score"
      ) +
      theme_review
  }
}
```

## Lay Summary {#sec-lay}

```{r}
#| label: lay-recovery
#| eval: !expr has_data
cat("*Accessible recovery trajectory visualisations for non-specialist audiences.*\n")
```

::: {.callout-note}
## Data Status

```{r}
#| label: data-status
if (!has_data) {
  cat("No extracted recovery data yet.\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf(
    "%d datapoints from %d studies.\n",
    nrow(recovery), length(unique(recovery$study_id))
  ))
}
```
:::
